headline: Does Leadership Transition and Tom’s Settlement Reshape Colgate-Palmolive's Legal Risk Profile and Brand Trust (CL)?
summary: Colgate-Palmolive recently disclosed that long-time Chief Legal Officer Jennifer M. Daniels plans to retire in 2026, with Executive Vice President Betsy Fishbone set to assume the Chief Legal Officer and Secretary role from June 1, 2026, while Daniels transitions to Vice Chair to support an orderly handover. Around the same time, Colgate and its Tom’s of Maine subsidiary agreed to a US$2.90 million class action settlement over toothpaste marketing practices, highlighting how legal risk...
